interpretation_note: High-confidence cells show the lowest uncertainty burden and are the best screening candidates.
Low-confidence cells are review-oriented and should not be treated as firm operational targets.
Medium-confidence cells dominate the practical baseline and should be interpreted as bounded screening support.
